---
bibliography: references.bib
---

# Romans

The Jews will be saved. Three views:

1.  All Jews from all times

2.  All Jews alive at the time when Jesus returns (but Salvation requires faith)

3.  Nation of Israel as a whole (majority) will turn to Christ

Rom 9: not all who have been born of Israel

Galations 2:16 Salvation from faith (including Abraham)

Zech 12:10 I wil pour out s spirit of grace and prayer on the family of David. They will look on me whonm they have pierced (?refers to Jews???)
